flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Grayson College rose 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.1k → $12.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grayson College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Grayson College rose 287% between 2021 and 2024 (17.2% → 66.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Grayson College rose 63% between 2021 and 2024 (24.5% → 39.9%).
